scenes.narration: Retenzy is an all-in-one Shopify platform that boosts Customer Lifetime Value using integrated loyalty rewards and referrals.
scenes.visual: A digital diagram showing customer repeat purchases connected to loyalty points and referral bonuses.

scenes.narration: With no-code widgets and automated reviews, it seamlessly drives social proof and improves search visibility.
scenes.visual: An interface showcasing easy drag-and-drop rewards widgets and automated customer review stars.
